overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic tropical city with palm trees, modern glass architecture, and light traffic. The player walks from a parked car along sidewalks, through a covered security entrance, and across a large intersection with futuristic skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with palm trees and parked vehicles

events.description: begins walking forward from stationary position near the parked car
turns right at the street corner to follow the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a parked black sedan, approaching a street corner lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: man in gray suit crossing the sidewalk in front of the camera path
black sedan parked at the curb with chrome details

entered.detail: futuristic black sedan with chrome trim and tinted windows parked at the curb
tall palm trees lining the street against the bright sky
tall modern building with glass facade rising in the background
black and gold bollards marking the edge of the pedestrian area

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a futuristic black sedan parked on a sunlit street lined with palm trees. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a gray suit, then turns right at the corner. Modern office towers rise in the background against a clear blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered building entrance with security checkpoint

events.description: enters the covered area under the building overhang with security checkpoint visible
moves into shadow cast by the building overhang, reducing direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking under the building overhang past a security checkpoint area with green neon signage

entered.detail: large concrete and wood overhang providing shade over the walkway
security checkpoint with green neon signage reading SECURITY
building exterior with horizontal glass louvers and reflections

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under a large building overhang into a semi-covered security entrance area. The lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the camera passes a security checkpoint with green neon signage. The glass facade of the building features horizontal louvers, and the street noise diminishes in this sheltered zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk alongside multi-lane street with metal security fencing

events.description: exits the covered building area back into open sunlight along the street
black sports car drives past on the street alongside the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a metal security fence with a glass building behind it, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: black sports car driving down the multi-lane street
person in dark clothing walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall black metal fence with horizontal slats running along the property line
modern street lamp with cyan illuminated base and horizontal light bar
reflective glass building facade visible behind the security fence

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the camera walks along an open sidewalk bordered by a tall metal security fence with a modern glass building behind it. Futuristic street lamps with cyan lighting line the path. A black sports car drives past on the adjacent multi-lane road, and a pedestrian approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with marked crosswalks and futuristic commercial plaza

events.description: arrives at the Jackson street crosswalk with painted walk signals on the ground
begins crossing the wide intersection following the crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection at the marked crosswalk, passing the Jackson street sign and heading toward the commercial plaza

notable_agents.action: woman with red hair walking ahead on the crosswalk in the same direction

entered.detail: blue street sign mounted on a pole reading Jackson
yellow striped crosswalk with green WALK text painted on the asphalt
low-rise commercial building with CityLife signage and modern facade
tall futuristic tower with unique architecture visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wide intersection marked with yellow crosswalk stripes and a blue Jackson street sign. Crossing the road, the view opens to a large plaza area with the CityLife commercial building on the left and a distinctive futuristic skyscraper rising in the center distance. A pedestrian with red hair walks ahead as the camera follows the crosswalk path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit tropical street through a sheltered security zone and into a wide urban plaza. It begins by moving past a parked black sedan and a pedestrian on a palm-lined sidewalk, turning a corner beneath a clear blue sky framed by modern office towers. As the camera moves under a large building overhang, the bright daylight shifts into mixed shadows and green neon signage within a semi-covered security entrance. The scene then opens back into the sunlight along a sidewalk bordered by a metal security fence and cyan street lamps, passing a black sports car on the adjacent road. Finally, the camera crosses a wide intersection marked with yellow stripes and a blue street sign, expanding the view toward a large plaza and a towering futuristic skyscraper in the distance.
